chapter_title.en: Traditional reports that confirm the uprising of Imam Mahdi

text: . والأخبار في هذا المعنى أكثر من أن تحصى لا نطول بذكرها الكتاب.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: There are a large number of traditions on this topic, but we have quoted only some of them in order to keep the discussion brief.
